description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden pistol grip, giving it a distinctive, tactical appearance. The barrel is metallic and features a ribbed pump section, indicating a pump-action mechanism, and the muzzle is slightly protruding. The receiver and trigger guard are finished in black, contrasting with the warm brown of the wooden grip. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized to the grip, providing ergonomic access to the trigger. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible stock or additional attachments, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The materials and construction suggest durability and functionality, typical of urban law enforcement or self-defense scenarios.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel, black receiver, and a wooden pistol grip. The design is minimalistic and tactical, with a ribbed pump and no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden pistol grip, black receiver, ribbed pump, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the ribbed pump section beneath the barrel, with the grip and receiver mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the wooden grip and black receiver visible, as well as the pump and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded end of the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel, with the pump and muzzle barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed pump section and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
